image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Ever wondered how far away that thunder really is?
Context visual: When you hear thunder, you can actually estimate its distance using sound.
Escalation visual: For every five seconds between the flash and the bang, that’s about one mile away.
Evidence visual: This is based on the speed of sound, roughly one mile per five seconds.
Payoff visual: So next time you hear that rumble, count and know how far it is!
Cta visual: Curious about more natural phenomena? Like and follow for more science insights!
